response.justification: Strong generalist senior engineer with 10+ years across multiple stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI systems, cloud-platform AI architecture (AWS/GCP/Azure), vector databases, or RAG. Customer-facing technical leadership at staff level is also not clearly demonstrated. Worth a screening call to probe depth of GenAI/MCP work.
strengths: 10+ years senior/staff engineering with TypeScript, Node.js, and polyglot delivery
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong track record shipping production systems (high-throughput data integration, AWS CDK, GIS platform)
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years specifically building production AI/GenAI solutions
Vector databases, RAG architectures, and cloud-native AI design not mentioned
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery, stakeholder leadership, or evaluation/observability pipelines for AI

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
Strong polyglot senior engineering and production delivery record
